senses.definition_en: to make a choice or reach a conclusion about something after thinking about it

examples.en: We need to decide where to go for our vacation.
examples.fa: باید تصمیم بگیریم برای تعطیلات کجا برویم.

examples.en: He couldn't decide which pair of shoes to buy.
examples.fa: او نمی‌توانست تصمیم بگیرد کدام جفت کفش را بخرد.

notes: Commonly followed by "to" + infinitive ("decide to go") or by a wh-clause ("decide where/when/whether to go").
